zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes II de Champlitte於1155年出生在法國福朗-可特艾豪-薩o哈普利特時，他的父親Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte44歲，母親Sybille de La Ferté20歲。他於1187年與Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes II de Champlitte于1155年出生在法国福朗-可特艾豪-薩o哈普利特时，他的父亲Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte44岁，母亲Sybille de La Ferté20岁。他于1187年与Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Rodes
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes II de Champlitte was born in 1155, in Champlitte, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France, his father, Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte, was 44 and his mother, Sybille de La Ferté, was 20. He married Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean in 1187. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1204, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes II de Champlitte est né en 1155, à Champlitte, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Sybille de La Ferté, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean en 1187. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1204, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes II de Champlitte 1155 in Champlitte, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte 44 und seine Mutter Sybille de La Ferté 20. Er hat 1187 Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes II de Champlitte è nato il nel 1155 nel Champlitte, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Sybille de La Ferté, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean nel 1187. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1204, nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes II de Champlitteが1155年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンチャンプリットで生まれた時，父Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitteは44歳，母Sybille de La Fertéは20歳であった。1187年にAgnès de Mont-Saint-Jeanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes II de Champlitte(이)가 1155년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 챔플리트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybille de La Ferté(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1187년 Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes II de Champlitte nasceu em 1155, em Champlitte, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Sybille de La Ferté, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean em 1187. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes II de Champlitte родился в 1155 г. в местности чамплитт, хауте-саoн, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Sybille de La Ferté, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean в 1187 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes II de Champlitte nació en 1155, en Champlitte, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Eudes Odo I, De Champenois, Seigneur De Champlitte, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Sybille de La Ferté, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnès de Mont-Saint-Jean en 1187. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1204, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 49 años.
